author: Fr4gm3nt3d.sh
description: Watches a forum channel for new posts and checks for mclo.gs log links, prompting users to upload logs if missing.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store any data or metadata about users.
install_msg: Thanks for installing LogWatcher! Make sure to set the NEXTCLOUD_USER and NEXTCLOUD_TOKEN environment variables in your Docker Compose file. Use `[p]logwatcher` to get started.
name: LogWatcher
short: Watches forum posts for mclo.gs log links
